scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others -n "server,teacher,student,admin,shared-schemas,client,client-ui,common-ui" -c "blue,green,magenta,yellow,cyan,white,gray,black" "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev:teacher -w dashboard" "npm run dev:student -w dashboard" "npm run dev:admin -w dashboard" "npm run dev:shared-schemas" "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:client:ui" "npm run dev:common:ui"
scripts.build: npm run build:client:core && npm run build:dashboard:core && npm run build:server
scripts.build:client:core: npm run build -w @school/shared-schemas && npm run build -w @school/client-ui && npm run build -w @school/common-ui && npm run build -w client
scripts.build:dashboard:core: npm run build -w @school/shared-schemas && npm run build -w @school/client-ui && npm run build -w @school/common-ui && npm run build --prefix dashboard
scripts.build:dashboard: npm install --include=optional --ignore-scripts=false --no-audit --no-fund && npm install --prefix dashboard --include=optional --ignore-scripts=false --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build:dashboard:core
